name: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Columbus Pawn Shop (Columbus)
description_short: Columbus, OH's CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM at Columbus Pawn Shop on Parsons Ave offers convenient cryptocurrency access during extended business hours.
description_long:
The CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM - Columbus Pawn Shop (Columbus) location sits at 1704 Parsons Ave in Columbus, OH, housed within Columbus Pawn Shop. This convenient kiosk operates during extended hours Monday through Saturday from 9AM to 6PM, and Sundays from 9AM to 5PM, making it accessible whether you're a morning crypto buyer or an evening trader. Being inside an established pawn shop adds security and legitimacy to your transaction experience in Columbus.

This Columbus, OH location offers full cryptocurrency exchange services including Bitcoin purchases with cash or card. Whether you're new to crypto or an experienced trader, the on-site ATM makes transactions straightforward. For questions about current rates, daily limits, or specific transaction details, contact the location directly at +1 773-800-0106 to speak with staff at Columbus Pawn Shop.

Columbus residents appreciate having a Bitcoin ATM within a trusted pawn shop environment on Parsons Ave. Bring a valid government ID and your preferred payment method—cash works quickly and securely at this Columbus location. Whether you're investing in cryptocurrency for the first time or adding to an existing portfolio, this ATM provides local access without needing an online exchange account.
pros: Cash-to-crypto transactions completed same-day without bank account linkage required
Extended store hours (9 AM–6 PM weekdays, 9 AM–5 PM Sunday) with 24/7 customer support available
CoinFlip Account feature allows daily transaction limits up to $15,000 and faster repeat visits
Dedicated mobile wallet app (CoinFlip Crypto Wallet) simplifies transaction preparation
Located within established Columbus Pawn Shop, a familiar retail destination
Bi-directional service—ability to both buy Bitcoin and sell for cash at select locations
Multiple cryptocurrencies available (beyond Bitcoin), providing portfolio diversification options
cons: Bitcoin ATMs typically charge significantly higher fees than traditional crypto exchanges, though specific rates not disclosed on this page
Transaction limits and available cryptocurrencies may vary by location, requiring verification before visiting
Cryptocurrency purchases carry high volatility and investment risk; unregulated market with no consumer protection guarantees
Requires valid identification and may involve regulatory compliance checks that delay transactions
No mention of buy-back guarantees, price locks, or consumer dispute resolution mechanisms
best_for: Consumers seeking quick cash-to-Bitcoin conversions without opening traditional crypto exchange accounts
First-time cryptocurrency buyers comfortable with higher fees in exchange for immediate accessibility
Existing Columbus Pawn Shop customers interested in diversifying transactions at a familiar location
Unbanked or underbanked individuals with cash but no traditional bank account for exchange sign-ups
diagnosis: CoinFlip Bitcoin ATM at Columbus Pawn Shop is best for unbanked consumers, first-time crypto buyers, or anyone needing immediate cash-to-Bitcoin conversion without opening an exchange account. The primary caveat is that Bitcoin ATMs charge higher fees than traditional exchanges, cryptocurrency carries substantial volatility and regulatory risk, and this service should be viewed as a convenience premium rather than an investment platform.
services: CoinFlip Crypto Wallet download and setup
Daily transaction limits up to $15,000 (with variation by location)
24/7 customer support via phone (1-877-757-2646) and email (support@coinflip.tech)
Receipt generation and transaction history access
Location-finder service for nearby CoinFlip ATM network
